mapper.select: /* SnsUserRepository.findSnsUser */ SELECT MEMBER_SEQ AS memberSeq, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, SNS_LOGIN_TYPE AS snsLoginType, SNS_ACCESS_TOKEN AS snsAccessToken, MEMBER_EMAIL AS email, MEMBER_NAME AS name, MEMBER_NICKNAME AS nickname, ACCOUNT_STATUS AS accountStatus, MEMBER_GRADE AS memberGrade, MEDIA_SEQ AS mediaSeq FROM MH_EXT_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND SNS_LOGIN_TYPE = #{loginType}
